description_long: This object is a handheld electronic gaming console, featuring a wide rectangular body with rounded corners and a central display screen. On the left side, there is a directional pad and an analog stick, while the right side houses four action buttons, another analog stick, and additional smaller buttons. The front face is dominated by the screen, with the controls symmetrically arranged for ergonomic use. The side views reveal the slim profile of the device, with buttons and sticks protruding slightly for tactile feedback. The back is smooth and unadorned, likely designed for comfortable grip during extended use. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for portable entertainment in urban environments.
description: A sleek, handheld gaming console with a central screen, dual analog sticks, and multiple buttons for interactive play.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, directional pad, analog sticks, and action buttons clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the protrusion of the analog sticks and buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smooth, featureless back surface for comfortable grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness and button protrusions.
